name: ChatVLSC ChatGPT App Readiness

tool_plan.name: get_service_status
tool_plan.description: Use this when ChatGPT needs current ChatVLSC service, route, AI, OCR, or file-sort readiness.

tool_plan.name: get_identity_policy
tool_plan.description: Use this when ChatGPT needs to explain allowed identity-provider matching rules for ChatVLSC.

tool_plan.name: get_workspace_access_reconciliation
tool_plan.description: Use this when ChatGPT needs the least-workspace IDP/access reconciliation gates for ChatVLSC.

tool_plan.name: evaluate_identity_claims
tool_plan.description: Use this when ChatGPT needs a non-persistent allow or deny decision for supplied identity claims.

tool_plan.name: plan_file_sort
tool_plan.description: Use this when ChatGPT needs to classify files into a proposed directory plan without moving files.

platform_status.target_discovery: OpenAI Platform connector was exposed but rejected the API key target request in this session.

submission_note: This config is readiness metadata for the primary ChatVLSC MCP app on api.thevlsc.com/user_role/v1. The mcp.thevlsc.com/v1 route is RLI Assistant; the legacy chatvlsc_dev client key remains only for compatibility.
